chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Good Deeds

text: 1695 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «مَنْ أُتِيَ إِلَيْهِ اَلْمَعْرُوفُ فَلْيُكَافِئْ بِهِ وَ إِنْ عَجَزَ فَلْيُثْنِ فَإِنْ لَمْ يَفْعَلْ فَقَدْ كَفَرَ اَلنِّعْمَةَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1695 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Whoever receives kindness, let him reciprocate it. If he is unable to do so, let him express gratitude. If he does not, then he has denied the blessing."
